tasks: From Fig1E.pdf plot results, what is the mean value of the AI-to-non-AI citation hit rate ratio across all 19 disciplines? Report only the number rounded to two decimal places.
From the Fig1F.pdf plot results, what is the mean value of received citations for AI-to-non-AI papers across all 19 disciplines? Report only the number rounded to two decimal places.
From Fig2E.pdf plot results, what is the Pearson correlation coefficient between x-axis and y-axis? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.

From Fig3AB.pdf plot results, what is the p-value of the Pearson correlation between direct AI use and AI education level, excluding the top three computational disciplines? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.
From Fig3F.pdf plot results, what is the OLS slope of the engineering collaboration share trend from 1990 to 2019? Report only the number rounded to four decimal places.

From Fig4AC.pdf plot results, what is the lower bound of the 95% CI for the Pearson r between share of female scientists and direct AI use (log) across disciplines? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.

From Fig4EG.pdf plot results, what is the upper bound of the 95% CI for the Pearson r between share of URM scientists and direct AI use (log) across disciplines? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.
